name: HRT_PROFILE_MATCH_CRIT
description:
This table stores the Profile Items of the Source Profile that form the Match Criteria in the Profile Best Fit.

This table will act as a kind of temporary table storing the Matching Criteria so that the final query to match the Source Profile with the Target profiles is efficient and simpler. This table will have a structure similar to the HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS table with certain additional columns needed for Match.

columns.Name: PROFILE_MATCH_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key

columns.Name: SEARCH_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique ID to identify the Source criteria Profile items for a particular instance of Match

columns.Name: SEARCH_ATTRIBUTE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Column to identify the number of not-null columns that are to be matched between the Source Profile and the Target profiles

columns.Name: SEARCH_IMPORTANCE_PERCENT
columns.Comments: Column to store the particular Profile Item Row Importance Percent value, derived by dividing the Item Importance Value with the Total Importance for the Profile

columns.Name: SEARCH_RATING_USAGE
columns.Comments: Column to store if the particular Profile Item Row uses any Rating Model

columns.Name: SEARCH_NUMERIC_RATING1
columns.Comments: Numeric Tating Level value for the corresponding Rating Level

columns.Name: SEARCH_NUMERIC_RATING2
columns.Comments: Numeric Tating Level value for the corresponding Rating Level

columns.Name: SEARCH_NUMERIC_RATING3
columns.Comments: Numeric Tating Level value for the corresponding Rating Level

columns.Name: PROFILE_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_PROFILE_ITEMS

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_ID

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: MANAGER_ID

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: PARENT_PROFILE_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Parent Profile Item Id

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_PROFILES_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foriegn Key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Syndication source profile ID. Use this property to display the source profile of a syndicated item

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source Type. For example, IRC, OTA

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY1
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY2
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: SOURCE_KEY3
columns.Comments: Alternative Source Key

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date From

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date To

columns.Name: QUALIFIER_ID1
columns.Comments: The instance qualifier to use for the item

columns.Name: QUALIFIER_ID2
columns.Comments: The instance qualifier to use for the item

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID1
columns.Comments: The rating model

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID2
columns.Comments: The rating model

columns.Name: RATING_MODEL_ID3
columns.Comments: The rating model

columns.Name: RATING_LEVEL_ID1
columns.Comments: The rating value. The values depend on the rating model selected.

columns.Name: RATING_LEVEL_ID2
columns.Comments: The rating value. The values depend on the rating model selected.

columns.Name: RATING_LEVEL_ID3
columns.Comments: The rating value. The values depend on the rating model selected.

columns.Name: INTEREST_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Interest level

columns.Name: MANDATORY
columns.Comments: A generic mandatory check box

columns.Name: IMPORTANCE
columns.Comments: Relative importance. This field is used in Search and Compare Profiles

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
